text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Maybe I can hide it with this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower is in my office fiddling with her
bangs.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-oh, Big Brother... I'm just... um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-oh, Big Sister... I'm just... um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm breaking out on my forehead, so I thought...
maybe I could cover it with my bangs.
choice_data_list: Don't worry. You can't even tell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite that, her skin still seems to be bothering
her.
